CustomField.description: Sets the upper limit on the number of Payment records that can be created for a single Opportunity through the Payment Creation Wizard or payment scheduling. Default is 12. Increase this for organizations that use many installment payments. This does not limit manually created Payment records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum number of Payments that can be scheduled for a single Opportunity. Default is 12.
CustomField.label: Max Payments
